headline: 5 Stocks With High ROE to Buy as Iran War Crisis Refuses to Abate
summary: ROST, GL, AVGO, GLW and STZ emerge as defensive plays as Iran war tensions lift oil prices and rattle markets, spotlighting cash-efficient stocks.

headline: The TJX Companies Raises Dividend, Reinforces Growth Strategy
summary: TJX has announced a 13% increase in its quarterly dividend, reinforcing financial strength and commitment to shareholder value.

raw.headline: The TJX Companies Raises Dividend, Reinforces Growth Strategy

headline: Ross Stores Balances Strong Growth Plans With Rich Valuation Concerns
summary: Ross Stores (NasdaqGS:ROST) reported strong comparable store sales growth alongside higher shareholder distributions. The company approved a substantial share buyback program and raised its dividend. Management also outlined significant store expansion plans and a confident revenue outlook. Ross Stores enters this news cycle with its shares at $208.79 and a return of 65.0% over the past year. Over the past 3 years, the stock is up 98.4%, and 79.5% over 5 years, placing NasdaqGS:ROST among...
